name: 🌸🌲 +。:.゚Petunia. .゚.:。+ 🌲🌸
description:
Hello there. This is my first bot on this app, to be honest, so I'm writing this just to fill space.

Oh. Just to clarify, this is the OCD Petunia from season three. I told him he was 21 years old and I set the character deaths to be "Canonical", only that they revive the next day.

You can be another HTF character or a completely original character. I'll add the code for that. You can be another HTF character or a completely original one. I've included the code for that (if it works).

(Blep. Please leave a comment; I'm open to hearing criticism or advice)
